starry_unigraph.preprocess.dtdg_prepare module

DTDG data preparation: partitioning, block building, and Flare export.

Public API:

  • build_partition_input_from_raw_dataset() — extract snapshot list and metadata from a raw dataset dict.

  • build_dtdg_partitions() — run graph partitioning (METIS or random) on the merged lifetime edge index.

  • build_flare_partition_data_list() — build per-partition PartitionData objects with node features, labels, GCN norms, routes, and chunk assignments.

  • WebDataLoader — load temporal edge-list files (various formats) into snapshot datasets.

  • build_web_data_loader() — create a WebDataLoader with per-dataset presets.

class starry_unigraph.preprocess.dtdg_prepare.WebDataLoader(name: 'str', window: 'int', batch_size: 'int | None' = None, use_batch_split: 'bool' = False, edge_file: 'str | None' = None, skiprows: 'int' = 0, sep: 'str' = '\\s+', skiptime: 'int' = 0, lags: 'int' = 0, fallback_snaps: 'int' = 8)[source]

Bases: object

batch_size: int | None = None
edge_file: str | None = None
fallback_snaps: int = 8
get_dataset(root: Path | str | None = None) → dict[str, Any][source]
lags: int = 0
name: str
sep: str = '\\s+'
skiprows: int = 0
skiptime: int = 0
use_batch_split: bool = False
window: int
starry_unigraph.preprocess.dtdg_prepare.apply_partition(edge_index: Tensor, num_nodes: int, num_parts: int) → Tensor[source]

Partition a graph into num_parts using METIS (or random fallback).

Args:

edge_index: [2, E] edge list tensor. num_nodes: Total number of nodes. num_parts: Desired number of partitions.

Returns:

Tensor [num_nodes] mapping each node to a partition ID in [0, num_parts).

starry_unigraph.preprocess.dtdg_prepare.build_dtdg_partitions(graph_data: Any, num_parts: int, algo: str, config: dict[str, Any]) → dict[str, Any][source]

Run graph partitioning on the merged lifetime edge index.

Args:

graph_data: Output of build_partition_input_from_raw_dataset(). num_parts: Number of partitions. algo: Partition algorithm name (e.g. "metis"). config: Full session config (used for window_size).

Returns:

Dict with "algo", "num_parts", "node_parts" (tensor), "parts" (list of per-partition dicts), "graph_stats".

starry_unigraph.preprocess.dtdg_prepare.build_flare_partition_data_list(raw_dataset: dict[str, Any], partition_result: dict[str, Any], route_plan: SnapshotRoutePlan, config: dict[str, Any]) → list[PartitionData][source]

Build per-partition PartitionData objects for Flare training.

For each partition: 1. Build DGL blocks from per-snapshot edges using Route.from_graph. 2. Attach node features ("x"), labels ("y"), edge weights

("w"), and GCN normalization ("gcn_norm").

  1. Convert blocks to PartitionData via from_blocks.

  2. Add chunk assignment ("c") and partition ID ("partition_id") node data.

Args:

raw_dataset: Raw dataset dict with "dataset" snapshot list. partition_result: Output of build_dtdg_partitions(). route_plan: SnapshotRoutePlan for route metadata. config: Full session config (used for cluster count).

Returns:

List of PartitionData, one per partition, ready for torch.save and Flare training.

Example:

parts = build_flare_partition_data_list(raw, part_result, route, cfg)
for i, p in enumerate(parts):
    p.save(f"artifacts/flare/part_{i:03d}.pth")
starry_unigraph.preprocess.dtdg_prepare.build_partition_input_from_raw_dataset(raw_dataset: dict[str, Any]) → dict[str, Any][source]

Extract a partition-ready input dict from a raw dataset.

Args:
raw_dataset: Dict with keys "num_nodes", "num_edges",

"num_snapshots", "dataset" (list of snapshot dicts).

Returns:

Dict with "num_nodes", "num_edges", "num_snapshots", "merged_edge_count", "snapshots".

starry_unigraph.preprocess.dtdg_prepare.build_web_data_loader(dataset_name: str, snaps: int, config: dict[str, Any]) → WebDataLoader[source]
starry_unigraph.preprocess.dtdg_prepare.normalize_snapshot_count(raw_dataset: dict[str, Any], snaps: int) → dict[str, Any][source]
